chat.greeting:
Hi! I'm Keto, your keto assistant 🥑
You can ask me whether a product is keto-friendly, request a better alternative, send a photo of a product or label, or ask me to add a meal / product to your journal.

dashboard.trendAriaLabel: Net carbs per day progress chart
dashboard.macroFoot: Average over {{days}} days with macro breakdown · ~{{kcal}} kcal per day · Keto target: fat 70–75% · protein 20–25% · carbs 5–10%
dashboard.coffeeHero: Cups of coffee per day on average · {{total}} total ☕
dashboard.emptyData: No data to analyze yet. Add meals in the "Today" tab and insights will appear here.
dashboard.macroNoData: No meals with fat/protein breakdown yet to calculate the balance.
dashboard.ketoNoData: To set a keto period goal (e.g. 3 months), open Settings and choose a number of months. The count starts from the first day in the log.
dashboard.progressNoData: At least two logged days are needed to show the progress trend.
dashboard.peakHoursNoData: Not enough meals with a logged time to calculate the hourly distribution.
dashboard.coffeeNoData: No coffee entries (black · espresso · instant) found in the log.

dayCard.noMeals: No meals for this day yet.

meter.onTarget: On target — {{left}} g left until the limit ({{target}})
meter.nearLimit: On target, but nearing the limit — {{left}} g left until {{target}}

onboarding.welcomeBody: Let's get to know all the features — where everything lives and how to use it. It takes less than a minute, and each step highlights the relevant area in the app.
onboarding.carbRingBody: The ring shows how many net carbs you've logged today versus your target. As long as you're under the line, you're in the green. You can change your personal target in Settings.
onboarding.addMealBody: Write a free-form description of what you ate, and the AI estimates carbs, fat and protein and breaks it down into items. There's also voice recording (microphone) and a calculate-only button that doesn't save.
onboarding.shortcutsBody: One collapsible place for all your shortcuts: your saved products, meal templates, and duplicating yesterday's meals. A click adds them straight to the meal breakdown.
onboarding.chatBody: From this bubble you can ask whether a product is keto-friendly, request an alternative, send a photo — and even ask to add a meal to your journal. Keto sees your journal and answers based on your real data.
onboarding.journalTitle: The journal — all your past days
onboarding.journalBody: The full journal collapses under the current day. Open it to browse back, jump to a date, and see metrics for each day — weight, fasting, running and more.
onboarding.navBodyMobile: Here you switch between "Today", "Insights" and "My Products". Swipe left/right to move between them.
onboarding.navBodyDesktop: Here you switch between "Today" and "Insights". Click a tab to change the view.
onboarding.insightsBody: This is home to the dashboard and reports: averages and streaks, keto-period progress, and weekly/monthly AI reports written automatically that spot trends and recommendations — without you having to ask.
onboarding.productsBody: Save products you eat often here, along with their nutritional values. They pop up as quick tags when adding a meal — and the AI uses your exact values.
onboarding.barcodeBody: This button opens the camera barcode scanner — point it at the product barcode and all the nutritional values are pulled in automatically. You can also identify a product from a photo or type a barcode manually.
onboarding.settingsBodyMobile: Open the menu (☰) up here — and in Settings you set your daily target, keto-period goal, form of address, WhatsApp link, dark mode, report export, and also replaying this tour.
onboarding.settingsBodyDesktop: Here you set your daily target, keto-period goal, form of address, WhatsApp link, dark mode, report export — and you can also replay this tour anytime.

products.unsupportedFormat: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP
products.srcByQuantity: based on the quantity you entered
products.estimateLine: Per {{unit}} (out of {{per}} per pack · {{src}}): {{carb}} net carbs · {{fat}} fat · {{prot}} protein
products.imageError: Couldn't identify from the image — try a clearer photo or enter it manually.
products.scanError: {{msg}} — you can photograph the pack or enter it manually.
products.title: My products
products.help: Your regular products. They appear as tags below the description box — a click adds them to the meal description, then you calculate and log. They'll also be recognized when you type them in the description.
products.recognizingImage: Recognizing the product in the image…
products.imageWillBeSaved: It will be saved and shown in the product list

speech.notAllowed: No microphone permission — allow access in your browser settings
speech.noSpeech: No speech detected — move closer to the mic and try again
speech.network: Transcription failed — check your connection and try again
